'''âsh-ng-l''' ('''kashangal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xfeed|xfeed]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-ng-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xfeed|xfeed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-ng-l
|-
! Lemma
| kashangal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishangal|thishangal]] || [[word:jishangal|jishangal]] || [[word:shishangal|shishangal]] || [[word:kishangal|kishangal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushangal|thuthushangal]] || [[word:jujushangal|jujushangal]] || [[word:shushushangal|shushushangal]] || [[word:kukushangal|kukushangal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushangal|thushangal]] || [[word:jushangal|jushangal]] || [[word:shushangal|shushangal]] || [[word:kushangal|kushangal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushangal|thushangal]] || [[word:jushangal|jushangal]] || [[word:shushangal|shushangal]] || [[word:kushangal|kushangal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshangal|theshangal]] || [[word:jeshangal|jeshangal]] || [[word:sheshangal|sheshangal]] || [[word:keshangal|keshangal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshangal|thothoshangal]] || [[word:jojoshangal|jojoshangal]] || [[word:shoshoshangal|shoshoshangal]] || [[word:kokoshangal|kokoshangal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshangal|thoshangal]] || [[word:joshangal|joshangal]] || [[word:shoshangal|shoshangal]] || [[word:koshangal|koshangal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshangal|thoshangal]] || [[word:joshangal|joshangal]] || [[word:shoshangal|shoshangal]] || [[word:koshangal|koshangal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshangal|thĂŠshangal]] || [[word:jĂŠshangal|jĂŠshangal]] || [[word:shĂŠshangal|shĂŠshangal]] || [[word:kĂŠshangal|kĂŠshangal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashangal|thathashangal]] || [[word:jajashangal|jajashangal]] || [[word:shashashangal|shashashangal]] || [[word:kakashangal|kakashangal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashangal|thashangal]] || [[word:jashangal|jashangal]] || [[word:shashangal|shashangal]] || [[word:kashangal|kashangal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashangal|thashangal]] || [[word:jashangal|jashangal]] || [[word:shashangal|shashangal]] || [[word:kashangal|kashangal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shashangal|shashangal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshashangal|goshashangal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishashangal|gokishashangal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shashangalnĂŒ|shashangalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshashangalnknĂŒ|goshashangalnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishashangalnĂŒ|gokishashangalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shashangalshĂ«|shashangalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshashangalnkshĂ«|goshashangalnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishashangalshĂ«|gokishashangalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashangalro|shashangalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashangalnkro|goshashangalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashangalro|gokishashangalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shashangalmu|shashangalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashangalnkmu|goshashangalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashangalmu|gokishashangalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shashangalsher|shashangalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshashangalnksher|goshashangalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishashangalsher|gokishashangalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shashangalng|shashangalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshashangalnkng|goshashangalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishashangalng|gokishashangalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shashangalya|shashangalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashangalnkya|goshashangalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishashangalya|gokishashangalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shashangalyam|shashangalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshashangalnkyam|goshashangalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishashangalyam|gokishashangalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashangalnĂŒshĂ«|shashangalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashangalnknĂŒshĂ«|goshashangalnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashangalnĂŒshĂ«|gokishashangalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashangalnĂŒro|shashangalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashangalnknĂŒro|goshashangalnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashangalnĂŒro|gokishashangalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashangalnĂŒmu|shashangalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashangalnknĂŒmu|goshashangalnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashangalnĂŒmu|gokishashangalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashangalshĂ«nĂŒ|shashangalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashangalnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshashangalnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashangalshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishashangalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashangalshĂ«ro|shashangalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashangalnkshĂ«ro|goshashangalnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashangalshĂ«ro|gokishashangalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashangalshĂ«mu|shashangalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashangalnkshĂ«mu|goshashangalnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashangalshĂ«mu|gokishashangalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashangalronĂŒ|shashangalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashangalnkronĂŒ|goshashangalnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashangalronĂŒ|gokishashangalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashangalroshĂ«|shashangalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashangalnkroshĂ«|goshashangalnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashangalroshĂ«|gokishashangalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashangalromu|shashangalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashangalnkromu|goshashangalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashangalromu|gokishashangalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashangalmunĂŒ|shashangalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashangalnkmunĂŒ|goshashangalnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashangalmunĂŒ|gokishashangalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashangalmushĂ«|shashangalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashangalnkmushĂ«|goshashangalnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashangalmushĂ«|gokishashangalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashangalmuro|shashangalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashangalnkmuro|goshashangalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashangalmuro|gokishashangalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
